Compilation details
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Compiler version: 1.1.3-262
Compiler arguments:  -i /tmp/ssd_build/st_ai_output/pv_epoch0_OE_3_3_1.onnx --json-quant-file /tmp/ssd_build/st_ai_output/pv_epoch0_OE_3_3_1_Q.json -g network.c --load-mdesc /home/ilan/STMicroelectronics/stedgeai_v4/4.0/Utilities/configs/stm32n6.mdesc --load-mpool /tmp/ssd_build/my_mpools/stm32n6-app.mpool --load-cdesc /home/ilan/STMicroelectronics/stedgeai_v4/4.0/Utilities/configs/cortex-m55.cdesc --save-mpool-file /tmp/ssd_build/st_ai_ws/neural_art__network/stm32n6-app.mpool --out-dir-prefix /tmp/ssd_build/st_ai_ws/neural_art__network/ --network-name network -O3 --all-buffers-info --cache-maintenance --Oauto-sched --native-float --enable-virtual-mem-pools --Omax-ca-pipe 4 --Ocache-opt --Os --enable-epoch-controller --output-info-file c_info.json --generate-stai
